excluded_for_fidelity: regime trade_bias gating + partial-profit (FMP/LLM-driven; +6% OCO target dominates)
dynamic Alpaca actives/movers universe (not reconstructable point-in-time)
modeling_assumptions: decision uses bars through T-1; entry fills at T open (no look-ahead)
daily bars: same-day stop+target touch resolved stop-first (conservative)
trailing ratchet + pyramid evaluated at daily close (midday proxy)
circuit breaker approximated from T-open marks vs prior close
